titleStmt.title: SII 39.237: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 237. (A.R. No. 237 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1294 (1372 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to gift of lands for conducting the service called Rāhuttamiṇḍaṉ śandi, instituted by Śēvugapperumāḷ Kachchiyarāyaṇ son of Iḷamaipperumāḷ-Kachchiyarāyar, the grandson of Veṭṭuṅgai Aḻagiyār Kachchiyarāyar in the temple which is described as TirumuṭṭamuḍaiyaNāyaṉār at Suṅgadavirthachōḻanallūr alias Tirumuṭṭam in Viḷandai-kūṟṟam in Iruṅgōḷappāḍi nāḍu a sub-division of Mēṟkānāḍu in Vaḍagarai Virudarājabhayaṅkara vaḷanāḍu. The donor inherited the gifted lands from his father, who in turn purchased it from some Veḷḷāḷas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 2 100 9 10 4 liṉ
mel paritāpi varuṣati vaṭakarai viru
tarācapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkā nā
ṭṭu Iruṅkoḷappāṭi nāṭṭu viḷantaik
kūṟṟattu cuṅkan tavirtta coḻanallū
rāṉa tirumuṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tirumu
ṭṭa muṭaiya nāyanār koyiliṟ
caṇṭeśvara peruvilaiyāka 10
vvūril viṟṟa kāṇikaḷil koṇṭa
veḷḷāḻar palar pakkalilu muṉṉāḷ Eṉ pāṭ
ṭaṉār veṭṭuṅkaiyaḻakiyār kacciyarāyar
koṇṭa kāṇiyā yeṉkāṇiyāṉ naṉ
caikaḷ puñcaikaḷ maṉaikaḷ maṉait
tāṭṭaṅkaḷ toppukaḷ turavukaḷ maṟṟu
meppeyaṟppaṭṭaṉavu minnāyanār ti
rumuṭṭamuṭaiya nāyanāṟku Enpeyarā
ṟ kaṭṭina Irāvutta miṇṭan cantikku
m veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukkum candrāti
ttavaraiyuñ cellat tirunāmattu
k kāṇiyāka Utakam paṇ
ṇik kalveṭṭik kuṭut
ten Innāṭṭu śrī mattuva
rāpati viḷantai Uṭai
yān veṭṭuṅkaiyaḻakiyā
r kacciyarāyar makaṉār Iḷamai
p perumāḷ kacciyarāyar maka
n cevakap perumāḷ kacciyarāya
ṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai
cevakap perumāḷ kacciyarāyaṉ
Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
